steps.title: Recognize what 0.42 represents
steps.content: The expression $0.42x$ means 0.42 of the original quantity. Converting to a percentage: $0.42 = \frac{42}{100} = 42\%$. So 42% of the original quantity remains.

steps.title: Calculate the percent decrease
steps.content:
If 42% remains, then the percent that was removed is:
$$100\% - 42\% = 58\%$$
That matches Choice D — $58\%$.
